vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới (người có phong cách mới mẻ, thú vị)
vocab.example: Compared to the very traditional staff, my art teacher was a breath of fresh air with her unconventional teaching methods.

vocab.meaning: che chở, nâng đỡ và hướng dẫn tận tình
vocab.example: Seeing my potential in physics, Mr. Loc took me under his wing and mentored me for the national competition.

vocab.word: set someone on the right path
vocab.meaning: hướng ai đó đi đúng đường, có hướng đi đúng đắn
vocab.example: I was a bit of a troublemaker, but my homeroom teacher really set me on the right path with her firm yet kind advice.

vocab.meaning: có ích cho ai đó về sau này
vocab.example: The critical thinking skills my English teacher instilled in me have stood me in good stead throughout my university years.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm hiểu biết/nhãn quan
vocab.example: She didn't just teach geography; she truly broadened our horizons by sharing her travel experiences from around the globe.

vocab.meaning: để lại dấu ấn không thể phai mờ
vocab.example: His passion for social justice left an indelible mark on my character and influenced my choice of career.

vocab.meaning: có được sự tôn trọng từ mọi người (do phong thái hoặc năng lực)
vocab.example: He wasn't strict, yet he commanded respect the moment he walked into the classroom because of his immense expertise.

vocab.meaning: thách thức các giới hạn (khuyến khích học sinh vượt qua giới hạn bản thân)
vocab.example: My math teacher always encouraged us to push the envelope and solve problems using our own creative logic.

vocab.meaning: một kho tàng thông tin/kiến thức
vocab.example: You could ask her anything about literature; she was a veritable mine of information and always had a book recommendation ready.

vocab.meaning: rất tôn trọng và ngưỡng mộ ai đó
vocab.example: All the students held Dr. Smith in high esteem because he treated everyone with genuine dignity and fairness.
